threat: WorldLeaks ransomware group breached the City of Los Angels
content:
#!/bin/bash
# CDB APEX v37.0 Emergency Hardening - WorldLeaks ransomware group breached the City of Los Angels
apt-get update && apt-get upgrade -y 2>/dev/null || yum update -y 2>/dev/null
ufw enable 2>/dev/null; sed -i 's/PermitRootLogin yes/PermitRootLogin no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
systemctl restart sshd 2>/dev/null
echo '[+] Hardening applied for: CDB-APEX-1774115575.json'

threat: PolyShell flaw exposes Magento and Adobe Commerce to file up
content:
#!/bin/bash
# CDB APEX v37.0 Emergency Hardening - PolyShell flaw exposes Magento and Adobe Commerce to file up
apt-get update && apt-get upgrade -y 2>/dev/null || yum update -y 2>/dev/null
ufw enable 2>/dev/null; sed -i 's/PermitRootLogin yes/PermitRootLogin no/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config
systemctl restart sshd 2>/dev/null
echo '[+] Hardening applied for: CDB-APEX-1774097459.json'
